rationale: Die GS++-Anforderung BES.6.2 betrifft die Löschung von Daten beim Dienstleister im Fall einer Kündigung (ordentlich oder außerordentlich), inkl. Inhaltsdaten, Metadaten, Lizenzen und Zugriffsrechte. Beide Kandidaten [OPS.3.2.A6] und [OPS.2.3.A7] decken wesentliche Aspekte vollständig ab: (1) Both cover planned AND unplanned termination cases; (2) Both mandate secure data deletion after legal retention periods; (3) Both include removal of access rights. [OPS.3.2.A6] is from the Outsourcing offering side while [OPS.2.3.A7] is from the usage side - together they provide a comprehensive coverage matching the GS++ requirement's context of service provider relationships. Minor gap: Metadata specification isn't fully explicit in OPS variants, but is covered under comprehensive data handling.
